zh.lifeSummary: 當James Napier of Punknoll於1529年出生在英國多瑟特斯時，他的父親John Napier49歲，母親Anne Russell47歲。他於1544年與Joan Anne Masters在英國英格蘭薩默塞特丁爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1560年4月5日在英國多瑟特普可諾萊享年31歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特普可諾萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Napier of Punknoll于1529年出生在英国多瑟特斯时，他的父亲John Napier49岁，母亲Anne Russell47岁。他于1544年与Joan Anne Masters在英国英格兰薩默塞特丁爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1560年4月5日在英国多瑟特普可諾萊享年31岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特普可諾萊。

nameMeanings.name: Napier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Old French napier, nappier, nap(p)er(er) ‘one who looks after the napery or table-linen’, a derivative of Old French nappe ‘table-cloth, napkin’. In Middle English, Napier and Nap(p)er might also have denoted a maker of table cloths, though this sense has not been recorded.

English: alternatively an occupational name from Nap(p)er from an unrecorded Middle English word for one who makes naps, i.e. drinking cups or chalices (Middle English nap, Old English hnæp). Napper could also be a nickname from Middle English nappere ‘one who sleeps or naps’, though this is the least likely of the alternatives.
American shortened form of Polish   Napierala   or a similar name.

variants.name: Napper
meanings: Altered form of English or German   Knapper   or of German   Nepper  .

variants.name: Nappier
meanings: English: variant of   Napier  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Napierala
meanings: Polish (Napierała): nickname for an insistent person,from a derivative of napierać ‘advance, press, urge’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When James Napier of Punknoll was born in 1529, in Swyre, Dorset, England, his father, John Napier, was 49 and his mother, Anne Russell, was 47. He married Joan Anne Masters in 1544, in Tintinhull, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 April 1560, in Puncknowle, Dorset, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in Puncknowle, Dorset, England.

fr.of Y Berach,Aberdaron,Caernarvonshire,Wa: Aberdaron, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Napier of Punknoll est né en 1529, à Swyre, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Napier, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Anne Russell, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Joan Anne Masters en 1544, à Tintinhull, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 avril 1560, à Puncknowle, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Puncknowle, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Napier of Punknoll 1529 in Swyre, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Napier 49 und seine Mutter Anne Russell 47. Er hat 1544 in Tintinhull, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Joan Anne Masters geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. April 1560 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Puncknowle, Dorset, England und wurde in Puncknowle, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Napier of Punknoll è nato il nel 1529 nel Swyre, Dorset, England, il suo padre, John Napier, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Anne Russell, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Joan Anne Masters nel 1544, nel Tintinhull, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 aprile 1560, nel Puncknowle, Dorset, England, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Puncknowle, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: James Napier of Punknollが1529年にイギリスドールセトスウイアで生まれた時，父John Napierは49歳，母Anne Russellは47歳であった。1544年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトティンティンハルでJoan Anne Mastersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1560年4月5日にイギリスドールセトプウンクノウルで31歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトプウンクノウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Napier of Punknoll(이)가 1529년 영국 도르세트 스w이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Napier(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Russell(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1544년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 틴틴훌에서 Joan Anne Masters(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 4월 5일 영국 도르세트 푸c노우일에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 푸c노우일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Napier of Punknoll nasceu em 1529, em Swyre, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Napier, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Anne Russell, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Anne Masters em 1544, em Tintinhull, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de abril de 1560, em Puncknowle, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Puncknowle, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Napier of Punknoll родился в 1529 г. в местности свир, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Napier было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Russell, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Anne Masters в 1544 г. в местности тинтинулл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 апреля 1560 г. в местности пунккноул, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности пунккноул, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Napier of Punknoll nació en 1529, en Swyre, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Napier, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Anne Russell, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Joan Anne Masters en 1544, en Tintinhull, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de abril de 1560, en Puncknowle, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Puncknowle, Dorset, Inglaterra.
